site_index_policy: Use the matched canonical top-N AU VRI median SI as the TIPSY input for every planted species SI column; retain parsed MP11 SI only as provenance.
au_policy: Generate only candidate rows that map to canonical top-N L/M/H AUs by BEC zone/subzone and species overlap. Rows without a canonical top-N BEC match remain blocked.
